Name: FInlineEditableTextBlockStyle
Description: Represents the appearance of an SInlineEditableTextBlock

Variables.Name: EditableTextBoxStyle
Variables.Description: The style of the editable text box, which dictates the font, color, and shadow options.

Variables.Name: TextStyle
Variables.Description: The style of the text block, which dictates the font, color, and shadow options. Style overrides all other properties!
